prompt: Compose an 8-bar melody in the key of A minor that builds tension before a chorus.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 prechorus 8 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec prechorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q | q q q q | q q q q | q q q q | q q q q | q q q q | q q q q | q q x x x x x x x x
    n 57 59 60 59 | 57 59 60 62 | 64 65 67 65 | 64 65 67 69 | 69 71 72 71 | 69 71 72 74 | 76 77 79 77 | 76 77 79 80 80 80 80 80 80 80 80

  ch 2 Bass
    p w | w | w | w | w | w | w | w
    n 45 | 45 | 45 | 45 | 45 | 45 | 45 | 45

  ch 3 Chords
    p w | w | w | w | w | w | w | w
    n 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64 | 57 60 64

  ch 4 Kick
    p q q q q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _w | _w | _w | _w | _q q _q q | _q q _q q | q q q q | x x x x x x x x
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI provided an 8-bar melody in A minor that successfully fulfills the prompt, though it uses a G# (harmonic minor) at the end to maximize tension.
judgment.quality_reason: The arrangement perfectly captures the 'build tension' instruction by systematically raising the melody's pitch over 8 bars, introducing a leading tone, and increasing rhythmic density in both the melody and snare drum.
